channel.title: Bechno Kid's Hideout - RSS Feed
channel.description: The latest (and greatest?) from a beet disguised as a masked humanoid entity.

item.title: Apr 11, 2026
item.description:
Hi everyone! Very small update this time around since a lot of my taken has been taken up my Monster Hunter Stories 3

Here are the latest updates!

  • Wrote a new blog entry about the newest member in our family!
  • Fixed the CSS in the deviantART theme for Status Cafe! That was a little embarrassing, I'm not sure why it worked before!
  • Removed the interactive adopts since I wasn't taking care of them as often as I'd like to, oops. I prefer physical virtual pets anyhow!

That's it for now! I hope you all of a wonderful day!

item.title: Mar 30, 2026
item.description:
Hi, everyone! I can finally feel spring coming! The trees are blooming and look absolutely beautiful. I can't wait to eat some of the petals.

Here are the details for this update!

  • New artwork in the Digimon section.
  • New blog entry.
  • Added the "no AI" webring!

It's honestly thanks to the "no AI" webring's owner that I figured out something wrong with the DNS records for my domain. Thank you, rmf!!

That's it for now, I hope all of you have a great day!

item.title: Mar 17, 2026
item.description:
Hi everyone! I hope all of you are experiencing better weather than I am! If not, then let us suffer together!

I started working in an office again, so updates might be fewer than usual, but I'll still try to update at least once a month!

Here are the updates!

  • New artwork in the Digimon section
  • Updated /now page
  • There are now suggestions in my /contact page in case you ever want to send me a message but have no idea what to write! I hope they help.
  • There's a new shrine up! It's very special to me.

Some minor updates include:

  • Fixing the freezing GIFs script a bit. I noticed that right-clicking and saving a static image leads to a weird link that was generated by the <canvas> element. That should be fixed now!
    • I also added the option for users to play static images again by hovering/focusing on them.
  • Updating the colors around the page as well as changing how some pages look.

item.title: Feb 24, 2026
item.description:
Hi everyone! Hope you're all doing well! There may not seem to be a lot of updates to the site, but I did a lot of fixes on the back end!

  • Got a new domain! This site is still hosted by Neocities, so older links should still work. :3
  • There's some new artwork in the anime, Digimon and other pages!
  • New pages:
    • Uses - a page where I list what I use every day.
    • Contact - I basically consolidated my email, guestbook, and social media links into one page!
  • Made a new Status Cafe theme!
  • Updated credits section in links page
  • Added some new graphics and cleaned up some pages in general
  • Cleaned up webrings page so the performance can hopefully be better, but I wouldn't hold my breath lol

That's it for now! See you next time!

item.title: Feb 9, 2026
item.description:
Added a new section for affiliates in my links section!

If you'd like to be an affiliate, just shoot me an email at bechnokid@yahoo.com!

The only requirements I have is that your website isn't just an "About Me" page. Not that those are bad or anything, but I love sites with a ton of content in it, whether it's art, blogging, writing, anything!

That's it for now! Have a great day, everyone!

item.title: Feb 7, 2026
item.description:
Whoa, two updates in a week? It's almost unheard of!

Here's what's in today's update!

  • New tutorial! This one is for adding full descriptions to "prettified" RSS Feeds.
  • The old guestbook has returned! Yippee!!
  • Added a section for pending webrings.
  • Other fixes such as:
    • Reorganizing and cleaning up a lot of pages
    • Culling some of the quiz results and putting them in my /about page.

That's it for now! I hope all of you have a great day!

item.title: Feb 5, 2026
item.description:
Hello, everyone! I hope things are going ok for all of you! It's still pretty cold, but I hear that it'll get warmer next week! Just in time for my birthday!

Here's what's new in this update!

  • I moved the light/dark toggle button to be positioned below the navigation sidebar! I figured this might be easier to access since the sidebar is always fixed in one position.
  • New art in the anime section!
  • Added a new code snippet. I think Tumblr veterans might recognize this one. 😉
  • Updated now and pixel club pages!
  • I will also mention that I also added in new links, but seeing as how I seem to always add in new links with every update, I figure I won't announce it this time. 😅

That's it for now. See you next time!
